text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow Jeeves — Research Phase failed in mmmichaelllang/jeeves-memory.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow Jeeves — Daily Pipeline partially failed in mmmichaelllang/jeeves-unchained.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow Jeeves — Correspondence Phase failed in mmmichaelllang/jeeves-memory.
- [escalation] Google: Google security alert about a new sign-in on a Mac device.
- [escalation] Google: Google security alert about Opal gaining access to the Google account.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions failure notification for Jeeves Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions failure notification for Jeeves Write Phase.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions failure notification for Jeeves Research Phase.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: Another GitHub Actions failure for Jeeves Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] Sir Richard: Rich Lang shared a New York Times article about public schools and democracy.
- [escalation] Anthropic: Claude API access disabled due to depleted usage credits.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: Yet another GitHub Actions failure for Jeeves Daily Pipeline overnight.
